name: figure-skills
description: Team standards for publication-grade scientific-data-analysis figures.

plugins.name: figure-standards
plugins.description: Enforces the lab figure conventions on every figure: bold-titled self-contained legend at 10 pt that describes each panel, 14 pt panel letters, all text >= 8 pt, PDF + PNG + clickable .code.html provenance, and a programmatic no-text-overlap check that must pass before a figure is done.
